## Summary

- Why is this change needed?
- What changed?

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] Screenshots or recording attached for UI changes

## Documentation Impact

- [ ] No documentation update needed
- [ ] Documentation updated in `docs/`
- [ ] Documentation update needed, but not yet added

If docs are required, note the target file:

`docs/...`

If you want Gemini to write the docs update for this PR, add the `gemini:docs` label.

## Risk Notes

- Edge cases
- Areas that need reviewer attention
